diagrams.title: Basic Decision Tree Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical structure of a decision tree with root, internal, and leaf nodes
diagrams.purpose: Understand decision tree components and flow from root to leaf for classification

diagrams.title: Entropy vs Information Gain
diagrams.description: Visual representation showing how entropy decreases and information gain increases when data is split
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how splitting reduces impurity and how information gain measures this reduction

diagrams.title: Overfitting vs Pruned Tree
diagrams.description: Comparison between an overfitting decision tree and a properly pruned tree
elements: Complex tree with many nodes and branches
Overfitting curve (training accuracy high, test accuracy low)
diagrams.purpose: Understand the need for pruning and the difference between overfitting and optimal tree complexity
